name: full flow: a insurance claims vision is guided through decisions to a cited design and a test-first build
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"batch","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"medium","consistency_need":"eventual","communication_style":"request-response","integration_scope":"private","workload":"an insurance claims processing app"}}' > p.json
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh --vision "an insurance claims processing app" --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>se.txt
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/optimize-options.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --profile p.json --out scoring.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/decision-package.sh --options s/architecture-options.json --scoring scoring.json --out dp.json 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh scaffold --decision-id d1 --pillar security --requirements "encryption_at_rest,access_control" --build-dir bd 2>/dev/null
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh check --build-dir bd --unit d1 2>/dev/null; cbrc=$?
grep -q 'session_complete=true' se.txt && CB=$cbrc node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const tr=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("s/technical-requirements.json","utf8"));const ss=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("s/session.json","utf8"));const dp=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("dp.json","utf8"));const c=Object.values(tr.pillars).flat().map(x=>x.concern);const pillars=Object.keys(tr.pillars).filter(p=>tr.pillars[p].length).length;const rec=(ss.recommended_option_id||ss.recommended||"").toString();process.exit((tr.needs_grounding.length===0 && rec.length>0 && pillars>=7 && c.includes("encryption_at_rest") && dp.loop_closed===true && process.env.CB==="1")?0:1);' && echo insurance-claims-flow-complete 1>&2
